headline: MGM Resorts: A Better Business Than The Bid Suggests
summary: MGM Resorts International is a Buy as BetMGM profitability boosts earnings and lowers risk. Click for this updated look at MGM stock in light of takeover bids.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Caesars Entertainment, Raises Price Target to $31
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   maintains Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $26 to $31.
